case_title: GOLD CLUB ET AL VS. RICHARD ERNEST DURAN

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLD CLUB
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-20-2016 - JUDGMENT.
